name: mlx-agent
description: Structured local MLX discovery, adoption, and wiring for Apple Silicon agents.

interface.shortDescription: Discover, adopt, and wire local MLX models.
interface.longDescription: Structured local MLX discovery, adoption, and confirmation-gated wiring for Apple Silicon agents.
defaultPrompt: Use $mlx-scout to discover a local MLX model.
Use $mlx-adopt to recommend a model for coding.
Use $mlx-wire to preview a model configuration change.
